subcodes.first_line: He who circumambulated My Throne hath appeared with a Book wherein mention was made of My loved ones. We have remembered each one of them as a token of grace from Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر من طاف عرشی بکتاب فیه ذکر احبائی انا ذکرنا کل واحد منهم فضلا من
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement
